runtime.layout: Even spacing along closed Wavefire country ring (great-circle screen segments).

imageExport.privacy: Process only on-device or in your CI from trusted API downloads. Never send user photos to third-party vision APIs.

zoomOut.note: Expo AV has no per-channel low-pass; zoom-out darkening approximates muffled distance.

stereoPan.implementation: utils/firecircleAudio.ts setVolumeAsync(volume, audioPan) — pan strongest on Android MediaPlayer; iOS may ignore pan.

apiFields.thumbnailRule: Same host as getPublicApiOrigin(); relative /paths allowed.
